order.title: Order
order.description: An order representing a web development project with progress, payments, and notes.

id.description: The unique ID of the order.

userId.description: The Firebase User ID of the owner.

title.description: The title or package name of the order.

progress.description: The current progress of the project (percentage).

notes.description: User specific remarks or developer notes for the order.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp of when the order was created.

orders.description: Collection of all webdesign and logo orders.
